_comment: SINGLE-EDGE config. Only fav_hold = behavioural favorite-longshot edge (buy favorite in [buy_p, sell_p], hold to settle, NO stop; live-confirmed +EV, ~84% win). buy_p RAISED 0.70->0.76 on 2026-06-28 (REAL MONEY): per-coin OOS floor sweep (train older 472 / test newer 315 mkts) showed 0.76 is the only floor where all four coins are positive on the unseen test set, ~halves max-DD vs 0.70 (combined test DD 22->18, win 80%->85%), and doesn't starve btc/sol like 0.80. Per-COIN floors were REJECTED as overfit (train-best floor flips on test for every coin; per-coin n~30 too thin). Improvement is risk-adjusted (Sharpe/DD), not big EV. The spot/btc_spot_divergence sleeve was REJECTED live (19 trades, 15% win, -$74). CLUE: 15% ~= inverse of an 85% favorite -> spot may be systematically wrong-sided, so FADING the model might be +EV.
